title: SQL Query for Average Order Value
scenario: Write a SQL query to calculate the average order value for all orders placed in a specific year. The output should display the average order value and the total number of orders.
constraints: Must use the GROUP BY clause
Must use the YEAR function to filter orders by year

evaluationCriteria.description: The query should be syntactically valid SQL
The query should meet the specified constraints
The query should accurately calculate the average order value
